name: State Street Spdr S&P/Asx 200 Etf
analysis: STW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$79.6000, stop A$75.8142, target A$90.9574 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
